name: Correspondence
description: The rendering of a document to a medium and the transmission of the rendering via a communication channel.

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceType
attributeList.description: The type of correspondence (e.g. confirmation note, mail shot)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceAddress
attributeList.description: The address for message delivery (needs to match channel selection)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceDateTime
attributeList.description: Key dates used for the correspondence (e.g. generation date, mailing date, receipt confirmation date, re-send date)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceContent
attributeList.description: The message content (aligned to template as appropriate)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceTemplate
attributeList.description: Template used to assemble standard format correspondence (can be supplied with the correspondence or maintained within the Correspondence service domain as appropriate)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceCommunicationMethod
attributeList.description: Communication method used for the transmission of a correspondence. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: CorrespondenceMedium
attributeList.description: Medium through which the correspondence can be submitted such as paper, electronic or both.
